race.comment: RED CHICK (9) stuck on gamely into fourth last start over 1215m at this track, an improvement on her fifth at Gosford the run before. Peaking now and gets an important 2kg claim. HAYLEY'S ROCKET (10) ran a better race to finish fourth last time out over 1006m at this track. Backs up quickly and should be hitting her straps now. AUSBRED YAHOO (17) resumed over 1005m at Coffs Harbour last start and was too good for her rivals, scoring by a nose. Fitter for that last hitout and she can measure up again. FANCY SHOULDER (11) also returned a winner in her stable debut. Has improvement to come and carries the same weight with the claimer going on. Have to consider.
